Ice Age: Dawn of the Dinosaurs (2009)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $196,573,705Details
International Box Office $690,113,112
Worldwide Box Office $886,686,817
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $98,804,500
Blu-ray Sales (estimated) $21,776,781
Total $120,581,281
Further financial details...

Synopsis

The fun continues as Diego, Manny, and Sid all return for another round of prehistoric fun in this installment of the popular computer-animated children’s series.

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$41,690,382 (21.2% of total gross)
Legs:4.72 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:22.2% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$90,000,000 (worldwide box office is 9.9 times production budget)
Theater counts:4,099 opening theaters/4,102 max. theaters, 5.9 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $313,469,531

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: July 1st, 2009 (Wide) by 20th Century Fox
International Releases: July 1st, 2009 (Wide) (Bulgaria)
July 1st, 2009 (Wide) (Lithuania)
July 3rd, 2009 (Wide) (Ecuador)
Video Release: October 27th, 2009 by Fox Home Entertainment
MPA Rating: PG for some mild rude humor and peril.
Running Time: 93 minutes
Franchise: Ice Age
Cast, crew, or production detail: Animal Lead
Film format: 3-D, 3-D - Shot in 3-D
Plot point: Dinosaurs, Non-Chronological, Talking Animals
Subgenre: Family Adventure
Source:Original Screenplay
Genre:Adventure
Production Method:Digital Animation
Creative Type:Kids Fiction
Production/Financing Companies: Blue Sky Studios
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English
